⚙️

One-time setup

Connect your Supabase database to get started. This takes about 15 minutes and only needs to be done once.

1

Create a free Supabase account

Go to supabase.com, click Start your project, sign up, and create a new project. Pick any region closest to Singapore (e.g. Southeast Asia).

2

Run the database schema

In your Supabase dashboard, go to SQL Editor → New Query. Open the schema.sql file you received alongside this app and paste the entire contents, then click Run.

3

Get your API credentials

Go to Project Settings → API. Copy the Project URL and the anon public key from the API Keys section.

4

Enter your credentials below

Paste both values below and click Connect. They'll be saved in your browser so you only need to do this once per device.

Anytime Work
Operations

F&B Payroll Manager

—
Loading...
⏳

Pending-approval needs one database column

The approval_status column isn't in your Supabase shifts table yet, so bookings can't be saved as "Pending client approval" (they save as confirmed instead). Run this once in Supabase → SQL editor, then reload:
alter table shifts add column approval_status text;

Import Bookings

Paste payroll text or upload Excel/CSV, then reconcile workers and outlets before saving. Bookings already in the ops panel are auto-detected — duplicates merge into the existing booking and already-synced rows are hidden.

Paste or upload booking dataPreview first — nothing is saved until you confirm
ℹ️Recommended: copy from Google Sheets/Excel including headers, then paste below. Excel/CSV upload is also supported. Unmatched workers/outlets will be highlighted for mapping.

New outlet group

Add Knowledge Entry

Add shift

📅
🚫
This worker will not be saved as a member. The $10 fee is added under SR absorbed.
Choose Pending client approval if the client still has to approve this in the portal. Once they approve it there, this shift flips to Confirmed automatically, the worker is notified on WhatsApp, and an acknowledgement task is raised.

Cancel shift

⚠️
Worker cancellation returns the shift slot to Available. Outlet cancellation deletes the shift slot completely.
Penalty applies and counts toward worker suspension.
Leave blank for $15
Upload MC to waive $15 penalty (optional — can be added later)
ℹ️No MC yet? You can confirm now and the penalty stays waived as pending — upload the MC later from the shift row when the worker sends it.
📄
Tap to upload MC photo or PDF (optional)
MC uploaded — penalty waived
Cancellation still counts toward suspension

⚡ Urgent tasks

Cancellation requests and late-arrival notices that need an agent to act now. For a drop-out you can Acknowledge (confirm the worker is out and move the open slot to Replacement needed, no penalty) or Process cancellation (apply penalty / MC / suspension rules). Late notices need acknowledgement and the outlet informed.

🔁 Replacement needed

Open slots where a worker dropped out and the booking still stands. Shows today and all upcoming dates, grouped by day — regardless of which date the dashboard is showing. Outlet/client cancellations are removed entirely and never appear here.

🪑 Available slots

Shifts created but with no worker yet — today and all upcoming dates, grouped by day. These are the slots you still need to fill. Assign a worker directly from here.

🚫 Cancellations

Every processed worker cancellation, synced across devices. Today's cancellations show first, then the most recent cancellations from earlier dates. Good-will and outlet/client cancellations are not counted here.

Service recovery

ℹ️Use hourly replacement when a worker or 3rd party has a different hourly rate. Add the platform fee when the 3rd party also charges a fixed fee.
For external/manual names this defaults to $10 on top of the hourly rate difference.

⚠ Record Overpayment

⭐ Assign with Special Rate

💬 WhatsApp & Periskope Settings

Connect Periskope to send shift reminders directly to workers and track their replies.
Get your API key at console.periskope.app → Settings → API.

🌙 Night reminders — auto-sent to workers between 7 PM–10 PM for tomorrow's shifts
⏰ Clock-in reminders — auto-sent ~60 min before shift starts
✅ Acknowledgement tracking — when a worker replies OK / yes / confirm / 👍 / ✓, ShiftOps auto-ticks “Worker acknowledged” for that shift via webhook
🚨 Dispute & cancellation detection — when a worker replies that they can't make it or want to cancel (e.g. “cancel”, “can't make it”, “sick”, “MC”), ShiftOps flags the shift as disputed and surfaces a red alert + Process-cancellation button
💸 Payroll clock-out alerts

When a worker is clocked out, ShiftOps posts the pay breakdown to your dedicated payroll WhatsApp group via Periskope. Paste the group chat ID below (looks like 1203...@g.us). Find it in Periskope under the group's chat info / details, or use Test group message after pasting.

Webhook URL (paste this into Periskope → Settings → Webhooks → message.created):
https://jpfnrsxnnbtcadsnjrpc.supabase.co/functions/v1/periskope-webhook
ShiftOps API URL (add as Periskope Custom Tool):
https://jpfnrsxnnbtcadsnjrpc.supabase.co/functions/v1/shiftops-api
The webhook classifies each inbound reply and updates the worker's most recent pending reminder shift:
• ACK → sets night_acked / clockin_responded = true
  keywords: ok, okay, yes, y, confirm, confirmed, noted, sure, 👍, ✓, ✅, can, will be there
• DISPUTE → sets disputed = true, dispute_kind, dispute_reason (the raw message)
  keywords: cancel, can't make it, cannot make, not coming, won't come, sick, mc, emergency, reschedule, can't come, drop

Sends you a WhatsApp message whenever a worker clocks out. Uses CallMeBot (free).
Setup: save +34 613 01 49 37 as a contact, then send "I allow callmebot to send me messages" to that number.

Anytime Assistant
Powered by Claude AI
👋 Hi! I'm your Anytime Assistant. I can help you navigate the system or take actions like:

• Clock in/out a worker
• Cancel a shift
• Add a new shift
• Suspend/unsuspend a worker
• Find worker or shift info
• Add notes to a shift

Just ask in plain language!
